title: Admin Dashboard for Managing Bookings and Availabilities

subtasks.title: Implement Dashboard Layout and Navigation
subtasks.notes: DashboardLayout.tsx is fully implemented with sidebar, header, and routing. AdminHome.tsx provides a welcome page. Navigation structure is present.

subtasks.title: Develop Bookings Management Interface
subtasks.notes: Bookings.tsx is fully implemented with CRUD, table UI, and modal form integrated with Supabase. Context-based state management and real-time updates are in place.

subtasks.title: Build Availability Management System
subtasks.notes: Calendar-style UI and Availabilities.tsx are fully implemented. State is managed via context, and real-time updates are in place.

subtasks.title: Implement Data Integration and State Management
subtasks.notes: Data integration and state management are fully implemented using React Context API for both bookings and availabilities. Real-time updates and cross-table slot logic (for booking slot availability) are in place.

subtasks.title: Develop Access Control and Security Features
subtasks.notes: Authentication and role-based redirection are implemented. Next: protected admin routes, audit logging, and advanced security features.
